description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, featuring a spacious open-plan layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor areas. The house includes multiple rooms, such as bedrooms, bathrooms, a kitchen, and a living area, all arranged linearly along the length of the building. A green hedge or fence runs along the front and rear, offering privacy and a touch of landscaping. The main entrance is set back and accessible from a paved area, with a clear separation between indoor and outdoor spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and functional living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large glass windows, featuring a linear open-plan layout and landscaped fencing. The design is clean, minimal, and functional, with distinct indoor and outdoor zones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and a green hedge running along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, visible room divisions, and the linear arrangement of interior spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting additional large windows, sliding doors, and the continuation of the green hedge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the paved area, secondary entrances, and the overall rectangular shape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no steps, and a paved approach, flanked by large windows and a green hedge
